name: VStack
summary: Vertical `Stack` (`direction='column'`) — an explicit, readable alias for the most common column flow. Accepts every Stack prop except `direction`; children stretch on the cross axis by default.
bestPractices: Use VStack when an explicit name reads better than `<Stack>`; behavior is identical to a default Stack.
Keep `gap` tokenized so density/compact rescales the column; pass a breakpoint map for responsive spacing.
Override cross-axis alignment with `align` (start/center/end) when stretch is not what you want.
